case_title: LEE, JANET vs. ROXBURY PACIFIC, INC.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, JANET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROXBURY PACIFIC, INC. $820.00 PRINCIPAL, $74.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $894.00
REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, JANET AS TO DEFENDANT ROXBURY PACIFIC, INC.
